calendar.matters:
Compliance Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-16-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Aviva Roller of Workman Law Firm, PC telephone number 415-782-3660 for Plaintiff;
No other appearance on this matter.

Compliance Hearing: Ms. Roller reported as to distribution of payments pursuant to the settlement agreement. The Court has no further questions regarding compliance. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/EG

Plaintiffs Notice Of Application And Application For Order: A) Granting Final Approval Of Class Settlement; B) Approving Request For Claims Administrator Fee; C) Approving Request For Attorneys Fees And Costs; And, D) Approving Request For Incentive Payment To Class Representative Cory Stokes
Off Calendar Apr-06-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. ROBIN G. WORKMAN of Workman Law Firm, PC, Tel No. (415) 782-3660 appearing for the Plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CORY STOKES' Application For Order: A) Granting Final Approval Of Class Settlement; B) Approving Request For Claims Administrator Fee; C) Approving Request For Attorneys Fees And Costs; And, D) Approving Request For Incentive Payment To Class Representative Cory Stokes is granted. ORDER AND JUDGMENT BOTH SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

Motion For Final Approval
Off Calendar Apr-06-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. ROBIN G. WORKMAN of Workman Law Firm, PC, Tel No. (415) 782-3660 appearing for the Plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Cory Stokes' Motion For Final Approval is granted. ORDER AND JUDGMENT BOTH SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order A) Granting Preliminary Approval Of Class Settlement; B) Approving The Form And Manner Of Notice To Provide To The Proposed Settlement Class And Directing That A Neutral Third Party Give Such Notice To The Proposed Settlement Class; C) Appoving Hefler Claims Group, Llc, A Neutral Third Party, As Claims Administrator; D) Setting A Hearing For Final Approval Of The Proposed Settlement And Award Of Fees And Costs To Class Counsel
Off Calendar Jan-06-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. ROBIN G. WORKMAN of the Workman Law Firm, PC, Tel No. (415) 782-3660 appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. MATTHEW C. KANE of McGuire Woods LLP, Tel No. (310) 315-8200 appearing for the Defendant Interline Brands, Inc.

RULING - Court required counsel to appear. Counsel addressed the Court's questions regarding the proposed settlement. The Court ruled as follows: PLAINTIFF CORY STOKES, ON BEHALF OF HIMSELF AND ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED'S Motion For Order A) Granting Preliminary Approval Of Class Settlement; B) Approving The Form And Manner Of Notice To Provide To The Proposed Settlement Class And Directing That A Neutral Third Party Give Such Notice To The Proposed Settlement Class; C) Appoving Hefler Claims Group, LLC, A Neutral Third Party, As Claims Administrator; D) Setting A Hearing For Final Approval Of The Proposed Settlement And Award Of Fees And Costs To Class Counsel is GRANTED. The Court set a Final Approval Hearing for April 6, 2015 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/EHG)
